title: React Props Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of passing, using, and managing props in React components.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the best way to pass a prop named 'color' with value 'blue' to a 'Box' component?
In a functional component, how do you receive props as an object?
options: From the first argument of the function.

questions.question: Which of the following is true about props?
options: Props are mutable and can be changed by the child component.
Props are immutable (read-only) for the child component.
Props are only used in class components.

questions.question: Which property in the props object contains the content between the component's opening and closing tags?
How do you de-structure a prop named 'title' in a functional component definition?
